completedFeatures.name: Capacitor Charging/Discharging Simulation
completedFeatures.description: Interactive visualization of capacitor charging and discharging curves with real-time graphing
features: Animated circuit diagram with switch visualization
Real-time voltage vs time chart using Chart.js
Adjustable R, C, and V₀ parameters
Time constant calculation (τ = R × C)
Current flow animation
Educational content with formulas and explanations

completedFeatures.name: Capacitor Series/Parallel Calculator

Add multiple capacitors with different units (pF, nF, µF, mF, F)
Quick add preset buttons
Real-time calculation
Configuration comparison (series vs parallel)
Calculation steps display
Educational content explaining the formulas

completedFeatures.name: Buck Converter Simulation

Animated circuit diagram with MOSFET switching
Real-time voltage and current waveform visualization
Output voltage calculation (Vout = D × Vin)
Efficiency and ripple current calculations
Educational content explaining buck converter theory

completedFeatures.name: Wire Gauge & Ampacity Calculator
completedFeatures.description: Calculate wire properties, current capacity, resistance, and voltage drop
features: AWG selection with diameter and cross-sectional area display
Copper and aluminum material support
Length units (meters/feet)
Current capacity calculation with temperature and installation factors
Voltage drop and power loss calculations
Safety warnings for overcurrent
Quick reference AWG table
Educational content on wire sizing principles

completedFeatures.name: Buck-Boost Converter Simulation
completedFeatures.description: DC-DC converter with step-up/down capability and inverted output polarity
features: Animated circuit diagram with MOSFET switching
Real-time switching waveforms (gate signal, inductor current)
Adjustable parameters (Vin, duty cycle, L, C, load, frequency)
Output voltage calculation: Vout = -Vin × D/(1-D)
Voltage gain, efficiency, and ripple calculations
Quick presets (USB 5V→±12V, 12V→-5V, etc.)
Comprehensive educational content on buck-boost theory

completedFeatures.name: Transformer Calculator

features: Turns ratio calculation (a = N₁/N₂)
Voltage and current transformation
Impedance matching and reflection (Z' = Z/a²)
Visual transformer diagram with winding animation
Multiple calculation modes (primary→secondary, secondary→primary)
Quick presets (step-down, step-up, isolation, impedance match)
Educational content on transformer theory and applications

completedFeatures.name: AC Power Calculator

Phase angle parameter

Load type detection (resistive/inductive/capacitive)
